message:
fix(subquery): support correlated scalar subqueries with JOINs in FROM clause

The VDBE emit_scalar_subquery only opens one table cursor, so correlated
subqueries with JOINs (e.g. SELECT avg(r.rating) FROM books b JOIN
reviews r ON ...) silently returned NULL. Fix adds:

1. Detection (select_has_correlated_join_subquery) to route these queries
   through the connection-level fallback instead of VDBE codegen
2. inline_subqueries_in_expr method that substitutes outer column refs
   with literal values from the current row, executes the subquery, and
   replaces it with the result literal
3. Modified execute_join_select projection to handle subquery expressions
4. Fixed execute_group_by_join_select to produce a default aggregate row
   (COUNT→0) for implicit aggregation with no matching rows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
